text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a day out in town with Daiwa Scarlet, I'm
walking her back to the dorms, when suddenly...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hey. How do you spend your days off?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
N-nowhere in particular! It's just... How should I
put this? For reference!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I need to rest up if I'm going to do well in my
races, so I'm researching the best ways to take a
break!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Actually, um, I've been going around asking
people how they spend their days off to see what
will work for me.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Th-that's the truth, okay?! It really is for
reference!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: So... what do you do in your free time?
choice_data_list: I guess I usually do something relaxing indoors.
I guess I usually do something relaxing indoors.
I guess I usually do something active outdoors.
I guess I usually do something active outdoors.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hmm... So you're one of those types, huh?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I like to read manga when I'm free, so I kinda get
it.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Well, that was helpful! I'll see you tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On Daiwa Scarlet's next day off, she suggests we
watch a movie in my office.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We both have a great time taking a break from
training.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hmm... So you're one of those types, huh?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I like to go shopping when I'm free, so I kinda get
it.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Well, that was helpful! I'll see you tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On Daiwa Scarlet's next day off, she invites me on
a walk around town.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We both have a great time taking a break from
training.
